mapper.select:
SELECT td.id AS id, t.name AS name, c.course_name AS courseName, c.course_nature AS courseNature, col.college_name AS collegeName, td.college_id AS collegeId, maj.major_name AS majorName, td.major_id AS majorId, dic.dict_name AS courseType, td.total_credits AS totalCredits, td.hours_unit AS hoursUnit, td.total_hours AS totalHours, td.total_weeks AS totalWeeks, td.hour_teach AS hourTeach, td.hour_practice AS hourPractice, td.hour_operation AS hourOperation, td.hour_outside AS hourOutside, td.hour_week AS hourWeek, td.required_elective AS requiredElective, td.term AS term, td.remark AS remark, td.version AS version FROM training_program t LEFT JOIN training_program_detail td ON t.id = td.training_program_id LEFT JOIN course c ON td.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_dict dic ON c.dict_id = dic.id LEFT JOIN college col ON td.college_id = col.id LEFT JOIN major maj ON td.major_id = maj.id WHERE t.del_flag = 0 AND td.del_flag = 0 AND maj.del_flag = 0 AND t.id = #{trainingProgramId}
ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO training_program_detail ( id, training_program_id, course_id, course_nature, course_name, college_id, major_id, total_credits, total_hours, total_weeks, hours_unit, hour_teach, hour_practice, hour_operation, hour_outside, hour_week, required_elective, term, remark, version, create_time, update_time, del_flag ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.trainingProgramId}, #{item.courseId}, #{item.courseNature}, #{item.courseName}, #{item.collegeId}, #{item.majorId}, #{item.totalCredits}, #{item.totalHours}, #{item.totalWeeks}, #{item.hoursUnit}, #{item.hourTeach}, #{item.hourPractice}, #{item.hourOperation}, #{item.hourOutside}, #{item.hourWeek}, #{item.requiredElective}, #{item.term}, #{item.remark}, #{item.version}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
